timestamp.Description: A continuously increasing identifier of the sampling time registered by the device

driftcorr_x_coordinate.Description: Gaze position x-coordinate of the recorded eye, normalized as a proportion of the screen width and corrected for drift based on the lastest period of central fixation. Bound = [0, 1], where 0 = left. Coordinates outside the [0, 1] range indicate offscreen gaze position (< 0 left of screen, > 1 right of screen).

driftcorr_y_coordinate.Description: Gaze position y-coordinate of the recorded eye, normalized as a proportion of the screen height and corrected for drift based on the lastest period of central fixation. Bound = [0, 1], where 0 = bottom. Coordinates outside the [0, 1] range indicate offscreen gaze position (< 0 below screen, > 1 above screen).

reference_fixation_idx.Description: Row index in the run's physioevents.tsv.gz file corresponding to the fixation period used to drift correct gaze x and y coordinates.

confidence.Description: Quality assessment of the pupil detection ranging from 0 to 1. A value of 0 indicates that the pupil could not be detected, whereas a value of 1 indicates a very high pupil detection certainty.

x_coordinate.Description: Gaze position x-coordinate of the recorded eye, normalized as a proportion of the screen width. Bound = [0, 1], where 0 = left. Coordinates outside the [0, 1] range indicate offscreen gaze position (< 0 left of screen, > 1 right of screen).

y_coordinate.Description: Gaze position y-coordinate of the recorded eye, normalized as a proportion of the screen height. Bound = [0, 1], where 0 = bottom. Coordinates outside the [0, 1] range indicate offscreen gaze position (< 0 below screen, > 1 above screen).

pupil_x_coordinate.Description: Pupil position x-coordinate normalized as a proportion of the width of the eye video frame. A value of 0 indicates the left of the frame.

pupil_y_coordinate.Description: Pupil position y-coordinate normalized as a proportion of the height of the eye video frame. Values are ranging from 0 to 1. A value of 0 indicates the bottom of the frame.

pupil_diameter.Description: Diameter of the pupil as observed in the eye image frame (not corrected for perspective).

pupil_ellipse_axe_a.Description: Length of the first axis of the 2D fitted ellipse used to model of the pupil.

pupil_ellipse_axe_b.Description: Length of the second axis of the 2D fitted ellipse used to model of the pupil.

pupil_ellipse_angle.Description: Orientation of the 2D fitted ellipse used to model the pupil.

pupil_ellipse_center_x.Description: x-coordinate of the center of the 2D fitted ellipse used to model the pupil.

pupil_ellipse_center_y.Description: y-coordinate of the center of the 2D fitted ellipse used to model the pupil
